name: Three Five Systems, Inc.
description: Three Five Systems, Inc. was a company that previously provided specialized electronics manufacturing services to original equipment manufacturers (OEMs). Founded in 1953 and headquartered in Tempe, Arizona, the firm specialized in the electrical equipment sector. Following a shift in its business strategy, the company ceased its primary operations to focus on liquidating its assets and preparing for formal dissolution. The company was formerly traded on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol TFSY.
